skills.name: genmedia
skills.description: Run a fal.ai model end-to-end with the genmedia CLI. Use this when the user asks to generate an image, video, or audio; convert media; upscale or restyle; run any fal.ai model; or "use genmedia" for a task. Guides discovery, schema inspection, input preparation, execution, and result handling.

skills.name: genmedia-ref
skills.description: Complete genmedia CLI reference for fal.ai — consult this whenever the user asks you to search for models, run inference, upload files, check pricing, or manage async jobs on fal.ai. Use --json on every command to get structured output you can parse.
